title: As a user, I want to log in with email and password so that I can access my account
description: Implement secure user authentication with email and password credentials including validation and error handling.
acceptance_criteria: User can enter email and password on the login page
System validates credentials against the database
Valid credentials redirect user to the dashboard
Invalid credentials show a clear error message
Account is locked after 5 failed attempts

title: As a data analyst, I want interactive dashboards so that I can visualize key performance metrics in real-time
description: Build the foundation of the analytics module focusing on customizable dashboards with multiple visualization types and filtering capabilities.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboards support at least 4 visualization types (bar, line, pie, table) using sample datasets
Users can add/remove/resize widgets and the layout is persisted per user
Filters by date, category and metrics update all visualizations within 2 seconds
Data refreshes automatically every 10 seconds with manual refresh option
Dashboards render correctly on desktop, tablet and mobile viewports

title: As a manager, I want to view team performance reports so that I can track productivity
description: A dashboard view showing team velocity, completed stories, and sprint burndown charts filtered by date range.
acceptance_criteria: Manager can filter reports by sprint or date range
Reports show team velocity and completion rates
Burndown chart is visible per sprint
Data can be exported as CSV

title: As a user, I want to update my profile information so that my account stays current
description: Allow users to edit their name, email address, and profile avatar from the settings page.
acceptance_criteria: User can edit name, email, and avatar
Changes are saved with a confirmation message
Validation errors are displayed inline
Email change triggers a verification email

title: As an admin, I want to assign roles to users so that access is properly controlled
description: Role management interface for admins to assign and revoke user roles.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can view all users and their current roles
Admin can assign or revoke roles
Role changes take effect immediately without re-login

title: Migrate the entire legacy database, refactor all REST APIs, update frontend to new design system, write complete documentation, and deploy to cloud
As a data analyst, I want customizable reports with real-time export so that I can analyze and share data offline
description: Implement reporting engine with templates, generation logic and multiple export formats including real-time data pulls.
acceptance_criteria: Users can build reports via drag-and-drop interface selecting from available metrics
Reports generate in under 5 seconds for standard queries and can be saved
Export supports CSV, PDF and JSON formats with user-selected data ranges
Scheduled exports can be configured and delivered via email

title: As an analyst, I want ML predictions integrated into analytics so that I can forecast trends from historical data
description: Integrate basic ML models to generate and display predictions alongside visualizations.
acceptance_criteria: At least two ML models (forecasting and anomaly detection) are available and selectable
Prediction results display with confidence scores on dashboards and reports
Models can be retrained via an admin UI using the latest dataset
Predictions refresh asynchronously without impacting dashboard performance

title: As a manager, I want configurable alerts so that I am notified of critical changes or anomalies
description: Build rules-based alerting system tied to analytics data and ML outputs.
acceptance_criteria: Users can define alert rules based on metric thresholds or ML anomalies
Alerts trigger in-app notifications and emails with relevant context
Alert history is viewable with status, timestamp and resolution notes
System prevents duplicate alerts within a configurable cooldown period

title: As a DevOps engineer, I want the CI/CD pipeline fixed so that builds and deployments run reliably without errors
description: The current pipeline fails intermittently due to configuration and dependency issues. This work identifies root causes, applies fixes, and verifies stable operation for the development team.
acceptance_criteria: Pipeline successfully builds, tests, and deploys a sample change on the main branch with zero errors
Pipeline runtime is under 5 minutes and all stages (lint, test, build, deploy) are green in the UI
Error logs are empty and any new configuration is documented in the repo README
Team verifies the fix by triggering two consecutive successful runs after changes are merged
